acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_F005] PASS if the revised targeted lines contain no more than two comma-then transitions total and show at least three distinct transition structures by inspection; FAIL if the same comma-then sequencing remains dominant in those spans.

[chapter_15_F006] PASS if at least three targeted character entrances are revised to one concrete object detail plus one behavioral cue (instead of stacked accessory tags); FAIL if most of those entrances still depend on multi-item object cataloging.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised targeted lines contain no more than two comma-then transitions total and show at least three distinct transition structures by inspection; FAIL if the same comma-then sequencing remains dominant in those spans.
findings.problem: A recurring comma-then transition pattern ("..., then ...") appears repeatedly and starts to flatten rhythmic variation, signaling autopilot sentence construction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Target snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:50, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:52, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:54, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:158, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:304, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:342. Rebuild transitions with mixed structures (causal clauses, interruptions, hard stops, or beat breaks) rather than repeating comma-then linkage.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least three targeted character entrances are revised to one concrete object detail plus one behavioral cue (instead of stacked accessory tags); FAIL if most of those entrances still depend on multi-item object cataloging.
findings.problem: Minor-character introductions repeatedly rely on accessory inventory (bracelet/hearing aid/watch/tattoo/tins/jacket), creating mechanical repetition from over-literal concreteness and flattening differentiation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Target snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:66, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:84, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:104, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:132, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:330. Keep one high-yield concrete detail per entrance, then prioritize behavior, syntax, or interactional pressure for characterization.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
